characters: Stranger - A mysterious person in a long black coat with golden trim and hidden face behind collar and hat; Desscaras
timeline: Evening - Desscaras walks through the narrow streets of Morvin as evening bells echo.
Late afternoon/evening (no specific time) - The Stranger arrives in town.
worldFacts: The glowing symbol is etched into a stone archway and linked to local rumors of portals beneath the city. It appears after Desscaras' arrival.
Stranger conceals their identity with clothing, according to world facts.
